name: Meat Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 teaspoons salt (1/2 teaspoon would be sufficient)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large, well-greased casserole dish, combine all ingredients.
3. Bake for 2 hours and 15 minutes. This recipe serves 8.
4. The food exchange values are: 1 starch/bread exchange + 3 meat exchanges + 1 vegetable exchange per serving.
5. Note: This is a very old cookbook (1972) with only calories listed, which total 280 per serving.
